scripts.build: npm run build -w @hailmary/contracts && npm run build -w @hailmary/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @hailmary/contracts && npm run test -w @hailmary/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @hailmary/contracts && npm run lint -w @hailmary/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @hailmary/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @hailmary/web
